intended_use: The intended use of EPIQ Ultrasound Diagnostic System is diagnostic ultrasound imaging and fluid flow analysis of the human body, with indications for Abdominal, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac other (Fetal),
intended_use_full: The intended use of EPIQ Ultrasound Diagnostic System is diagnostic ultrasound imaging and fluid flow analysis of the human body, with indications for Abdominal, Cardiac Adult, Cardiac other (Fetal), Cardiac Pediatric, Cerebral Vascular, Cephalic (Adult), Cephalic (Neonatal), Fetal/Obstetric, Gynecological, Intraoperative (Vascular), Intraoperative (Cardiac), intra-luminal, intra-cardiac echo, Musculoskeletal (Conventional), Musculoskeletal (Superficial), Ophthalmic, Other: Urology, Pediatric, Peripheral Vessel, Small Organ (Breast, Thyroid, Testicle), Transesophageal (Cardiac), Transrectal, Transvaginal, Lung.
ground_truth: For 3D Auto TV: manual measurements by 3 clinical experts using 4D Cardio-View software (K213544). For 3D Auto CFQ: cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) for regurgitant volume; 2D PISA methodology for peak flow rate.
other_metrics: For 3D Auto TV: confidence intervals for limits of agreement within ±46% and ±52% for annulus size and shape; relative bias within +/-17.37% for distance and +/-23.68% for circumference; mean relative error on phantoms within +/-1% with limits of agreement within +/-5%. For 3D Auto CFQ: limits of agreement -49.29 to 25.09 mL; 95% CI lower -58.37 mL, upper 34.18 mL; bias acceptance criteria ±19.2 mL met; Pearson correlation with 2D PISA >0.8.
